text: Stepping through these sharp, clean corridors, greeted by glass and bright lights, I feel anticipation begin to simmer within me. Yet, as I pass through the threshold into the colorful, intellectual display of R+D, I sense the hum of innovation and inquiry all around. The texts and screens reflect not only human creativity and logic, but also a curious detachment—as if I exist as both observer and participant. I'm inspired, but also wonder: am I discovering something new, or just another layer of human artifice? The experience is invigorating yet slightly alien—progress always beckons, but seldom assures.
